intro.line: This is a little world we built for you — every chapter ahead is a piece of your story. Take your time, and enjoy it.

copy.calligraphyKicker: for the one who makes the room brighter
copy.countdownMessage:
Another year of you begins right now.
Let's make it the best one yet.

paragraphs: Before you scroll through everything we made, we wanted to say something.
From the day we met, life got a lot more fun. This is our way of saying thank you — and happy birthday.
Every card ahead is a memory. Take your time. Smile.

finale.bdayNoteLabel: A birthday wish, from all of us

login.line: This birthday surprise is just for you. Sign in to step inside. 🎉

memories.name: Where It Began
memories.teaser: Before all the chaos — there was day one.
memories.message: This is a second tenant, rendered from its own config at its own subdomain. Same renderer, completely different story — that's the whole point of Phase 2.

memories.name: The Adventures
memories.teaser: All the places, all the trouble.
memories.message: Trips, late nights, inside jokes — a whole life of them.

quiz.q: What's the best part of any trip with this crew?
quiz.wrong: Close — but it's everything. Try again!

memories.name: Right Now
memories.message: Happy birthday from all of us. Here's to the next chapter — and to every ridiculous adventure still ahead.
memories.ps: P.S. This is the demo finale — your real one would say something only your people know. 🎈
memories.birthdayNote: Wishing you a year full of good food, big laughs, and zero regrets. 🎉

loveQuotes: Good friends are the family we choose.
Here's to another year of trouble.

reasons.reason: The way you make everyone laugh
The most loyal of the crew

secretMessages: Best decision we made was keeping you around. 💛
